ground_truth.title: From 'One Battle After Another' to 'Knives Out,' 10 movies to stream now
ground_truth.author: Brian Truitt
ground_truth.main_content: Need a new movie to watch? Stream these 10 at home for free with Netflix, Disney+, Hulu, HBO Max, Paramount+ and Amazon Prime Video. Football fans and awards-season mavens are feasting this time of year, and there's something for each coming home for a very streaming Christmas. Netflix, Peacock, Hulu, Disney+ and Amazon's Prime Video have flicks for every taste, from a Riz Ahmed paranoia thriller to a queer zombie flick from director Tina Romero. 'Him' - The football horror flick stars Tyriq Withers as a pro prospect quarterback. 'Merv' - In the holiday rom-com, Anna (Zooey Deschanel) and Russ (Charlie Cox) are a recently broken-up Boston couple who share their beloved dog. 'Roofman' - Channing Tatum's equal parts heartwarming and hilarious performance boosts this stranger-than-fiction, true-life dramedy. 'Taylor Swift | The Eras Tour | The Final Show' - The concert film captures the global superstar's lively final show filmed in Vancouver.
with: Need a new movie to watch? Stream these 10 at home for free with Netflix, Disney+, Hulu, HBO Max, Paramount+ and Amazon Prime Video.
Netflix, Peacock, Hulu, Disney+ and Amazon's Prime Video have flicks for every taste, from a Riz Ahmed paranoia thriller to a queer zombie flick from director Tina Romero.
Boasting a leading nine Golden Globe nominations, director Paul Thomas Anderson's timely action dramedy is a must-see heading into Oscar season.
